_comment: 高质量训练基线示例；使用新模型名，但可复用相同 voice.id 的共享 WAV / Higher-quality baseline example; use a new model name while reusing shared WAVs with the same voice.id

experiment._comment: 不要用紧凑模型的 checkpoint 续训；质量预设结构不同 / Do not resume a compact checkpoint; the quality architecture is different
experiment.name: model_quality_1

text_generation._comment: 替换成自己的共享文本设置；相同语义配置会复用公共语料 / Replace with your shared text settings; identical semantic settings reuse the corpus

generation._comment: voice 字段必须与旧配置完全相同才能复用 WAV / Voice fields must exactly match the old config to reuse WAVs

voice.speaker: voice_01
voice.prompt: A warm, natural adult voice with clear pronunciation, medium pitch, steady pace, and calm friendly delivery.
voice.reference_text: Hello, this is the reference voice used to create a consistent multilingual speaker.

training._comment: 先用 batch_size=4；显存不足改为 2，质量训练不要只跑 20 epoch / Start at batch_size=4; use 2 on OOM and do not stop quality training at 20 epochs

quality._comment: 正式训练强烈建议安装 quality extra 并开启 semantic / Production training should install the quality extra and enable semantic checks
